User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account registration and preferences schema

uid.description: Unique user authentication identifier matching the Auth UID

photoURL.description: Secure reference to user avatar URL

createdAt.description: UTC timestamp indicating profile creation time

Memory.title: Nebula Memory Meta
Memory.description: Analysis metadata for an ingested chronological memory item

fileKey.description: Key composed of size-lastModified-name used for local mapping

name.description: Display name of the image metadata file

hour24.description: 24h standard parsed location in day timeline for sorted views

caption.description: AI or locally generated cinematic caption translation

category.description: Memory category (e.g. Travel, Portrait, Food, Nature)

peopleCount.description: Number of human count detected in the memory

colorPalette.description: Exactly three color palette hex codes

syncedAt.description: UTC timestamp of the synchronization event

SharedGallery.title: Shared Gallery Catalog
SharedGallery.description: Public shareable memory timeline mapping processed images and styles

images.description: List of catalog objects with public remote storage download URLs

createdAt.description: Creation timestamp of this public record

/users/{userId}.description: Individual account nodes mapped to authenticated active users

/users/{userId}/memories/{memoryId}.description: Synchronized personal memory logs and image analysis maps

/shared_galleries/{galleryId}.description: Shared timeline maps with remote image urls
